items.question: What is an AI site generator?
items.answer: An AI site generator is a tool that uses artificial intelligence to create a complete website based on a short description of your business or project. Instead of choosing a template and filling in content manually, you describe what you need and the AI builds a structured, styled site for you in seconds.

items.question: How is a generator different from a template?
items.answer: A template is a pre-designed layout where you swap in your own text and images. A generator creates a unique site from scratch based on your description, so the content, structure, and style are tailored to your specific business rather than starting from a one-size-fits-all design.

items.question: Are these generators free to use?
items.answer: Yes. You can generate, customize, and publish a site without entering a credit card. Strikingly offers free plans that include hosting and a published URL. Premium features like custom domains and advanced analytics are available on paid plans.

items.question: What kinds of sites can I build?
items.answer: You can build business websites, portfolios, landing pages, blogs, online stores, link-in-bio pages, event sites, and more. The generators cover a wide range of industries and use cases, from restaurants and photographers to wedding planning and personal branding.

items.question: Can I customize what the generator produces?
items.answer: Absolutely. After the AI generates your site, you can edit every element — text, images, colors, layout, and sections. The generator gives you a strong starting point, and the editor lets you refine it until it's exactly what you want.

items.question: Do generated sites work on mobile?
items.answer: Yes. Every site produced by Strikingly's generators is fully responsive, meaning it automatically adapts to look great on phones, tablets, and desktops. You can also preview and fine-tune the mobile layout in the editor.
